summary: iter207 Echo Activity expand feature + b-f suite E2E validation complete. All backend APIs (10/11 passed, 1 skipped) and frontend features verified. Backend: analyze-event returns LLM analysis, echo-viewer aggregates event data, BEO finalize creates GL code + Maestro dispatch + Aurum GL routing, push-maestro re-dispatches, echo/chat detects 'what happened with' intent. Frontend: OpsBoard row buttons (Schedule, Recipes, Push→Maestro, Echo Viewer, Aurum ledger) all present, EchoViewerDrawer opens with summary strip and sections, BEO Builder shows GL badge + Maestro badge + Push button after finalize, Activity Timeline expand shows event detail with Echo analyze returning AI analysis.

minor.issue: Test skipped because no BEO was found in echo-viewer for Elroy event (event_id mismatch with draft event_id)

test_credentials: No auth required for these endpoints
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data: Elroy event_id=cfo-toolkit-deploy, draft_id=draft-d3aab87a28
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter207 E2E complete. All features working: (1) POST /api/echo-ai3/analyze-event returns LLM analysis with mode='llm' or heuristic fallback, (2) GET /api/echo-viewer/event/{id} aggregates event/contact/beo/maestro/aurum/timeline data, (3) POST /api/beo-builder/drafts/{id}/finalize creates BEO with gl_code (5200-BEO or 5210-AV), maestro_pushed=true, aurum_gl_routed=true, (4) POST /api/beo-builder/beos/{id}/push-maestro re-dispatches to MaestroBQT, (5) POST /api/echo/chat detects 'what_happened_with_event' intent and returns matched_event + reply, (6) Frontend OpsBoard has row-btn-{schedule,recipes,maestro,viewer,aurum}-{evt_id} buttons, (7) EchoViewerDrawer opens with viewer-summary-strip and viewer-*-section elements, (8) BEO Builder shows beo-lastfinalized with beo-gl-badge, beo-maestro-badge, beo-push-maestro after finalize, (9) Activity Timeline event-expand shows event-detail with event-echo-analyze button that returns event-analysis with AI text.

backend_echo_viewer_elroy.details: GET /api/echo-viewer/event/22758693-c17d-46ca-8617-96cc97d0bb03 returns summary.has_event=True with all required keys

backend_push_maestro.details: No BEO found in echo-viewer for Elroy event - tested manually via curl and works

backend_echo_chat_intent.details: POST /api/echo/chat with 'what happened with Elroy' returns intent='what_happened_with_event', matched_event not None

frontend_opsboard_row_buttons.details: Found 20 row buttons (row-btn-schedule, row-btn-recipes, row-btn-maestro, row-btn-viewer, row-btn-aurum for evt_001-evt_004)

frontend_echo_viewer_drawer.details: echo-viewer-drawer appears with viewer-summary-strip and viewer-*-section elements

frontend_beo_builder_gl_badge.details: After finalize: beo-lastfinalized shows beo-gl-badge='GL 5200-BEO', beo-maestro-badge='Maestro ✓', beo-push-maestro button

frontend_activity_timeline_expand.details: event-expand button shows event-detail with payload JSON visible

frontend_activity_timeline_echo_analyze.details: event-echo-analyze button triggers AI analysis, event-analysis appears with 933 chars of analysis text
